prompt: Two premium business cards arranged on a dark marble surface with gold veining. The front card displays large stacked L and K in a high-contrast serif typeface like Didot or Bodoni with dramatic thick-thin strokes and elegant hairline serifs, rendered in charcoal. A thin gold foil horizontal rule separates the LK from DESIGN AND BUILD in small widely-spaced sans-serif below. The name Lyda appears in elegant type, with phone number 0481 742 026, email and Adelaide address details. The back card beside it shows just the large serif LK in gold foil stamping centered on a charcoal (#2C2C2C) background with a thin gold rule beneath. Both cards are 600gsm cotton stock with soft matte texture, thick luxurious edges visible. Gold foil catches the light. Sophisticated product photography, shallow depth of field.
negative_prompt: cheap paper, thin cards, glossy plastic, blurry text, cluttered design, bright colors, neon, pile of cards, messy arrangement, low quality, cartoon, casual fonts

settings.lighting: soft studio lighting with subtle reflections on foil
